# iproute_l2tp_session (Resource)

Manages an L2TP session (ip l2tp add session).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# L2TP session
resource "iproute_l2tp_session" "example" {
  tunnel_id       = iproute_l2tp_tunnel.udp.tunnel_id
  session_id      = 1
  peer_session_id = 1
  name            = "l2tp-sess0"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `peer_session_id` (Number) Peer session ID.
- `session_id` (Number) Session ID.
- `tunnel_id` (Number) Tunnel ID.

### Optional

- `cookie` (String) Cookie value.
- `l2spec_type` (String) L2-specific header type.
- `name` (String) Session interface name.
- `peer_cookie` (String) Peer cookie value.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
